prose: Ferrocene electrophilic Fukui index (f⁺) — GFN2-xTB (semi-empirical tight-binding via xtb), gas phase, charge 0, multiplicity 1. Geometry: single-point on user-supplied ferrocene.xyz; SCF converged, no warnings reported. The most electrophilic atom is Fe (atom 11) with f⁺ = 0.22885456 (dimensionless). Command: cli.py fukui ferrocene.xyz --method xtb --charge 0 --mult 1 --out ferrocene_fukui_xtb.json.
